top_signals.title: Pentagon sees growing espionage threat from Israel
top_signals.summary: Israel and the U.S. have long known that each was spying on the other but recent Israeli efforts to learn about U.S. positions in talks with Iran may have crossed a line.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Wallet linked to Ethereum co-founder Joseph Lubin moves 110,000 ETH to defend $259 million DAI debt position
top_signals.summary: Onchain analysts described the move as defensive collateral management to reduce liquidation risk, not likely a sale.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Hyperion DeFi to unwind $29 million in HYPE deals with Felix, Native Markets as USDH sunsets
top_signals.summary: Roughly 800,000 HYPE will return to the company's treasury for redeployment to "more profitable" strategies, per a Friday filing.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
